meta.business_goal: Cover Decision + Generation System dataset calibration

negative_constraints: Do not make the central headline small.
Do not use a plain flat background.
Do not let the bottom photo overpower the headline.
Do not remove the live-event proof layer.
Do not use low-contrast thin typography for the main claim.

reusable_prompt_signals: snow mountain or summit event visual
purple underline and motion accent strokes
high contrast white text over dark middle area
tech event atmosphere with blue and white palette
risk_notes: Avoid implying specific personal identities from the exhibition-floor people; describe them only as crowd or event attendees.
Chinese text legibility is central to the design and may fail if regenerated with inaccurate characters.
The design depends on balancing a busy real-photo bottom section with a clean dark headline area.
A regenerated image should avoid unauthorized logo misuse unless the brand assets are licensed or provided.
